title: [v4.8] systests: cp: add wait_for_ready
body:
[Manual backport of #20912, needed because #20282 is cropping up on v4.8 CI runs. Clean cherrypick.]

Some of the tests were doing "podman run -d" without wait_for_ready. This may be the cause of some of the CI flakes. Maybe even all? It's not clear why the tests have been working reliably for years under overlay, and only started failing under vfs, but shrug.

Thanks to Chris for making that astute observation.

```release-note
None
```
